# ‘Tis the season: Scaling with Sift Managed Services in Time for the Holidays

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

With the holiday season just around the corner, we know one thing for certain: fraudsters will be exploiting vulnerabilities in teams overwhelmed with seasonal volumes. Discover how our team of experts can take on the day-to-day management of your fraud operations with our new Managed Services offering.

Hear from Sift Trust & Safety Architect, Jane Lee, and Eli Menaker, Customer Marketing, as they discuss scaling with Sift Managed Services.

*   **Learn how our team can ensure optimal fraud detection:** Our payment protection experts will collaborate closely with your organization to develop and fine-tune models tailored to your specific needs.
*   **Assess our newest offering:** Discussion on the origins of Sift Managed Services, what you can expect from our team, and how you can assess if this solution is a good fit for your trust and safety needs.

### Watch the On-Demand Webinar

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
